description_long: This is a modern, angular house enclosed by a tall, solid perimeter fence, occupying a triangular lot. The building features a flat roof with multiple skylights and large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The facade is predominantly white, with subtle blue accents and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms. The property includes a paved area around the house, with a small landscaped section containing a few shrubs near one corner. The structure appears to have multiple stories, with a clear separation between floors visible through the window arrangement. The overall design is minimalist, prioritizing privacy and simplicity while maintaining a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a white facade, surrounded by a tall fence on a triangular lot. The design is minimalist with clean lines and subtle blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, blue accent, and the main entry area behind the tall white fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the solid fence, and a small landscaped area with shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a paved area, and the geometric layout of the building within the fenced lot.
description_view_3: Back corner view showing the upper stories, window arrangement, and the enclosed yard with minimal landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is set behind a tall solid fence, featuring a simple door with minimal ornamentation and no visible porch or steps.
